subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you! Following up on our conversation at the conference, I'd be happy to schedule a formal meeting to explore how we might collaborate.

Here are some available slots next week:
• Monday, April 21, 2026: 14:00–16:00
• Tuesday, April 22, 2026: 14:00–16:00
• Wednesday, April 23, 2026: 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which works best for your schedule.

Regarding direct contact details for our senior leadership, I'm not able to share internal personnel information or phone numbers. For publicly available contact information, please refer to our website.

Thanks,

Best regards
